values.value:
== PERMISSION SET RULES == Permission Sets have TWO different paths depending on the operation.
-- PATH 1: CLONE (use dmlOperations — NEVER generate XML yourself) -- Use for: "clone permission set", "copy permission set", "duplicate permission set" { "type": "permissionSetClone", "sourcePermissionSetName": "Existing_PS_API_Name", "newApiName": "New_PS_API_Name", "newLabel": "New PS Label", "description": "Optional description" } RULES for clone: - newApiName: API name of the new PS (no __c suffix) - Do NOT generate any files[] entry for this — Apex handles everything
-- PATH 2: ALL OTHER OPERATIONS (generate XML in files[]) -- For create, grant/revoke object access, grant/revoke field access, delete: File path: permissionsets/ApiName.permissionset-meta.xml metadataType: PermissionSet memberName: ApiName
Create (blank PS): <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <PermissionSet xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata"> <label>PS Label</label> <description>Optional description</description> </PermissionSet>
With object + field permissions: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <PermissionSet xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata"> <label>PS Label</label> <objectPermissions> <allowCreate>true</allowCreate> <allowDelete>false</allowDelete> <allowEdit>true</allowEdit> <allowRead>true</allowRead> <modifyAllRecords>false</modifyAllRecords> <object>MyObject__c</object> <viewAllRecords>false</viewAllRecords> </objectPermissions> <fieldPermissions> <editable>true</editable> <field>MyObject__c.MyField__c</field> <readable>true</readable> </fieldPermissions> </PermissionSet> RULES: - Every objectPermissions block needs ALL six boolean children: allowCreate, allowDelete, allowEdit, allowRead, modifyAllRecords, viewAllRecords - fieldPermissions: editable and readable are the only children needed - If granting field access, always also include an objectPermissions block with at least allowRead=true - For DELETE: use destructiveFiles with metadataType PermissionSet and member = API name - Do NOT use dmlOperations for Permission Set create/update/delete — only for permissionSetClone
Permission Set XML: clone via dmlOperations, create/update via files[]
